evidence: "It is a FAMILY drama that has a key character in Amy a teen."
"I find it somewhat convoluted. I actually am getting confused with the time lines..."
"The character development was really just OK."
"This season was one adventure after another."
"Twist and turn. Fast pace, who is going to get found out..."
"The costumes, scenery, and acting all terrific."
"Acting, story line and characters all wonderful; they keep out the soap opera feel."
"The beautiful country side is a bonus."
"I believe these characters. Katy Segal is truly amazing as Gemma; and I like the soft side that they bring to Jax."
"With so much garbage on TV today, it is nice to have a family series that is about family."

summary: The user enjoys action-packed shows with strong character development and family themes. They appreciate high production quality and emotional depth in storytelling, while preferring fast-paced narratives. However, they show little loyalty to specific creators.
